mapper.select:
/* oms-po-SubicPoPlanReq-sql-oracle.xml - selectTOrderSubicPoPlanReq */ #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_TOP}
SELECT T.CHK , T.OWKEY , T.CTKEY , T.ICKEY , T.ICNM , T.UNICYN , T.ICTGT , T.SLPRC , T.ICEA , T.ICBND , T.ICCTN , T.ICPLT , T.ABLEREQORDERYN , T.URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(T.EADAYAVGOBQTY, 0) AS EADAYAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.BNDDAYAVGOBQTY, 0) AS BNDDAYAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.PLTDAYAVGOBQTY, 0) AS PLTDAYAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.EAMONTHAVGOBQTY, 0) AS EAMONTHAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.BNDMONTHAVGOBQTY, 0) AS BNDMONTHAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.PLTMONTHAVGOBQTY, 0) AS PLTMONTHAVGOBQTY , COALESCE(T.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY , COALESCE(T.B2CIBQTY, 0) AS B2CIBQTY , COALESCE(T.TOTQTY, 0) AS TOTQTY , COALESCE(T.CALAVDAYS, 0) AS CALAVDAYS , COALESCE(T.CTLEADTIME, 0) AS CTLEADTIME , COALESCE(T.AVDAYS, 0) AS AVDAYS , COALESCE(T.PONEEDDAYS, 0) AS PONEEDDAYS , COALESCE(T.PONEEDQTYEA, 0) AS PONEEDQTYEA , COALESCE(T.PONEEDQTYBND, 0) AS PONEEDQTYBND , COALESCE(T.PONEEDQTYPLT, 0) AS PONEEDQTYPLT , T.IBEXPCTDAY , T.REQORDERUNIT , T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT , CASE T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT WHEN 'BND' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICBND WHEN 'CTN' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICCTN WHEN 'PLT' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICPLT ELSE 0 END AS REQORDERQTY
, ROUND(CASE T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT WHEN 'BND' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICBND WHEN 'CTN' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICCTN WHEN 'PLT' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICPLT ELSE 0 END / NULLIF(ICBND, 0),2) AS REQORDERBND , ROUND(CASE T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT WHEN 'BND' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICBND WHEN 'CTN' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICCTN WHEN 'PLT' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICPLT ELSE 0 END / NULLIF(ICCTN, 0) ,2) AS REQORDERCTN
, ROUND(CASE T.DLVYREQORDERUNIT WHEN 'BND' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICBND WHEN 'CTN' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICCTN WHEN 'PLT' THEN BASEUNITQTY * ICPLT ELSE 0 END / NULLIF(ICPLT, 0) ,2 ) AS REQORDERPLT
, T.REQORDERDAY , T.REQORDERSTATUS , T.REQORDEREXCEPTYN , T.REQORDERSTATUSNM , T.SEQ , COALESCE(T.EXPCTAVDAYS, 0) AS EXPCTAVDAYS , COALESCE(T.AVGOBFROMDAY, 0) AS AVGOBFROMDAY , COALESCE(T.AVGOBTODAY, 0) AS AVGOBTODAY , COALESCE(T.AVGAPLYDAYS, 0) AS AVGAPLYDAYS , T.ACKEY , T.ACNM , T.SOHDKEY , T.REQORDERNO , T.REQORDERTYPE , T.INSERTDATE , T.INSERTURKEY , T.UPDATEDATE , T.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT '0' AS CHK , F.OWKEY , F.CTKEY -- 상품정보 , F.ICKEY , F.ICNM , F.UNICYN , F.LCKEY AS ICTGT , F.SLPRC , F.ICEA , F.ICBND , F.ICCTN , F.ICPLT , F.POABLEYN AS ABLEREQORDERYN , F.URGENCYREQORDERYN
-- 일평균 출고량 , F.EADAYAVGOBQTY --일평균수량 , F.BNDDAYAVGOBQTY , F.PLTDAYAVGOBQTY
-- 월평균 출고량 (집계테이블생성 필요 : 배치) , F.EAMONTHAVGOBQTY -- 월평균수량 , F.BNDMONTHAVGOBQTY , F.PLTMONTHAVGOBQTY
-- 온라인 재고 정보 , F.AVQTY , F.AVGQTY , 0 AS B2CIBQTY , F.TOTQTY , F.NOWCNVRTAVDAYS AS CALAVDAYS --현재 환산 가용일
-- 발주 가용일 산정 , F.CTLEADTIME , F.AVDAYS --발주 필요 가능일 : (가용일 + 센터 리드타임) - 현재 환산 가용일 [현재 환산가용일 : 총재고 / 일평균수량] , CASE WHEN F.PONEEDDAYS < 0 THEN 0 ELSE F.PONEEDDAYS END AS PONEEDDAYS -- 필요 발주량 : 발주 필요 가능일 * 일평균 수량 [ 발주 필요 가능일 : (가용일 + 센터 리드타임) - (총재고 / 일평균수량) -- 필요 발주일이 1일보다 작을 경우 0으로 표현 , CASE WHEN F.PONEEDDAYS < 0 THEN 0 ELSE F.PONEEDDAYS * AVGQTY END AS PONEEDQTYEA , CASE WHEN F.PONEEDDAYS < 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(F.PONEEDDAYS * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICBND,0), 2) END AS PONEEDQTYBND , CASE WHEN F.PONEEDDAYS < 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(F.PONEEDDAYS * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICCTN,0), 2) END AS PONEEDQTYCTN , CASE WHEN F.PONEEDDAYS < 0 THEN 0 ELSE ROUND(F.PONEEDDAYS * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICPLT,0), 2) END AS PONEEDQTYPLT
-- 발주 요청 , TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP + (COALESCE(F.CTLEADTIME, 0)), 'YYYYMMDD') AS IBEXPCTDAY , F.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(ICBND,0), 2) AS REQORDERBND , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(ICCTN,0), 2) AS REQORDERCTN , ROUND(F.REQORDERQTY / NULLIF(ICPLT,0), 2) AS REQORDERPLT
, CASE COALESCE(F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT, CASE WHEN ICBND > 0 THEN 'BND' WHEN ICCTN > 0 THEN 'CTN' WHEN ICPLT > 0 THEN 'PLT' ELSE '' END) WHEN 'BND' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.REQORDERQTY, COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY) / NULLIF(ICBND, 0)) WHEN 'CTN' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.REQORDERQTY, COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY) / NULLIF(ICCTN, 0)) WHEN 'PLT' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.REQORDERQTY, COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY) / NULLIF(ICPLT, 0)) ELSE 0 END AS BASEUNITQTY
, COALESCE(F.REQORDERUNIT, CASE WHEN ICBND > 0 THEN 'BND' WHEN ICCTN > 0 THEN 'CTN' WHEN ICPLT > 0 THEN 'PLT' ELSE '' END) AS REQORDERUNIT
, COALESCE(F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT, CASE WHEN ICBND > 0 THEN 'BND' WHEN ICCTN > 0 THEN 'CTN' WHEN ICPLT > 0 THEN 'PLT' ELSE '' END) AS DLVYREQORDERUNIT
, F.REQORDERDAY , F.REQORDERSTATUS , F.REQORDEREXCEPTYN , (SELECT COMDTNM FROM TORDER_MST_COM_DT DT WHERE DT.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND DT.COMHDKEY = 'POSTATUS' AND DT.INSERTSYSTM = 'OMS' AND DT.COMDTKEY = F.REQORDERSTATUS AND DT.LAKEY = 'KOR') AS REQORDERSTATUSNM , COALESCE(F.SEQ, 1) AS SEQ
-- 예정가용일 : (현 재고 - 일평균출고량 * 리드타임 + 발주산정량) / 일평균출고량 , ROUND( ( F.TOTQTY - CASE F.EADAYAVGOBQTY WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE F.EADAYAVGOBQTY END * F.CTLEADTIME + COALESCE(F.REQORDERQTY, CASE COALESCE(F.DLVYREQORDERUNIT, CASE WHEN ICBND > 0 THEN 'BND' WHEN ICCTN > 0 THEN 'CTN' WHEN ICPLT > 0 THEN 'PLT' ELSE '' END) WHEN 'BND' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICBND, 0)) * ICBND WHEN 'CTN' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICCTN, 0)) * ICCTN WHEN 'PLT' THEN CEIL(COALESCE(F.EXPCTAVDAYS, F.PONEEDDAYS) * AVGQTY / NULLIF(ICPLT, 0)) * ICPLT ELSE 0 END) ) / NULLIF(F.EADAYAVGOBQTY, 0) , 1) AS EXPCTAVDAYS , F.OBFROMDAY AS AVGOBFROMDAY , F.OBTODAY AS AVGOBTODAY , F.APLYDAYS AS AVGAPLYDAYS , F.ACKEY , F.ACNM , F.SOHDKEY , F.REQORDERNO , F.REQORDERTYPE , F.INSERTDATE , F.INSERTURKEY , F.UPDATEDATE , F.UPDATEURKEY FROM ( SELECT I.OWKEY , IC.CTKEY -- 상품정보 , I.ICKEY , I.ICNM , I.UNICYN , COALESCE(I.PURPRC, 0) AS SLPRC , I.ACKEY , AC.ACNM , SO.SOHDKEY , IC.LCKEY , S_ICUT.IC_EA AS ICEA , S_ICUT.IC_BND AS ICBND , S_ICUT.IC_CTN AS ICCTN , S_ICUT.IC_PLT AS ICPLT , I.POABLEYN -- 발주구역 , LC.ANSUNGB2BPOCTG , LC.NAMSAB2BPOCTG , LC.BUSANB2BPOCTG -- 일평균 출고량 , COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) AS EADAYAVGOBQTY --일평균수량 , TRUNC(COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) / NULLIF(IC_BND,0)) AS BNDDAYAVGOBQTY , TRUNC(COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) / NULLIF(IC_PLT,0)) AS PLTDAYAVGOBQTY -- 월평균 출고량 (집계테이블 생성 필요 : 배치) , COALESCE(ST.QTY, 0) AS EAMONTHAVGOBQTY -- 월평균수량 , TRUNC(COALESCE(ST.QTY, 0) / NULLIF(IC_BND,0)) AS BNDMONTHAVGOBQTY , TRUNC(COALESCE(ST.QTY, 0) / NULLIF(IC_PLT,0)) AS PLTMONTHAVGOBQTY
-- 온라인 재고 정보 , COALESCE(RIV.AVQTY, 0) AS AVQTY , COALESCE(RIV.AVQTY, 0) AS TOTQTY
-- 발주 가용일 산정 , COALESCE(RE.CTLEADTIME, COALESCE(I.LEADTIME, 0)) AS CTLEADTIME -- 부자재는 거래처 리드타임을 보아야 한다. , COALESCE(RE.AVDAYS, RO.NEEDDAYS) AS AVDAYS , COALESCE(RE.CALAVDAYS, TRUNC((COALESCE(RIV.AVQTY, 0)) / NULLIF(AV.QTY, 0))) AS NOWCNVRTAVDAYS -- 계산식 필요컬럼 , COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) AS AVGQTY
--발주 필요 가능일 : (가용일 + 센터 리드타임) - 현재 환산 가용일 [현재 환산가용일 : 총재고 / 일평균수량] , (COALESCE(RE.CTLEADTIME, COALESCE(I.LEADTIME, 0)) + COALESCE(RE.AVDAYS, RO.NEEDDAYS)) - COALESCE(RE.CALAVDAYS, TRUNC(COALESCE(RIV.AVQTY, 0) / NULLIF(COALESCE(AV.QTY, 1),0))) AS PONEEDDAYS
-- 예정가용일 : (현 재고 - 일평균출고량 * 리드타임 + 발주산정량) / 일평균출고량 , ROUND((COALESCE(RIV.AVQTY, 0)- CASE COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) WHEN 0 THEN 1 ELSE COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0) END * COALESCE(RE.CTLEADTIME, COALESCE(I.LEADTIME, 0)) + RE.REQORDERQTY) / NULLIF(COALESCE(AV.QTY, 0), 0), 1) AS EXPCTAVDAYS --발주요청 데이터 , RE.REQORDERUNIT -- 발주단위 , RE.DLVYREQORDERUNIT -- 배송용기단위 , RE.REQORDERQTY -- 발주요청수량 , COALESCE(REQORDERDAY, TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd')) AS REQORDERDAY , 'N' AS URGENCYREQORDERYN , COALESCE(RE.REQORDERAR, '') AS REQORDERAR , COALESCE(RE.REQORDERTYPE, '04') AS REQORDERTYPE -- 03 : 이고발주 , COALESCE(RE.REQORDEREXCEPTYN, 'N') AS REQORDEREXCEPTYN , RE.REQORDERSTATUS , RE.REQORDERNO , COALESCE(RE.SEQ, 1) AS SEQ , OBAVG.OBFROMDAY , OBAVG.OBTODAY , OBAVG.APLYDAYS
, RE.INSERTDATE , RE.INSERTURKEY , RE.UPDATEDATE , RE.UPDATEURKEY FROM TORDER_MST_IC I INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_ICXCT IC ON I.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_CT CT ON IC.CTKEY = CT.CTKEY INNER JOIN ( SELECT ICKEY , OWKEY , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'EA' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 1) AS IC_EA , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'BND' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS IC_BND , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'CTN' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS IC_CTN , COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ICUNITTYPE = 'PLT' THEN ICUNITQTY END), 0) AS IC_PLT FROM TORDER_MST_ICUTXTYPE WHERE OWKEY = 'DAISO' GROUP BY ICKEY, OWKEY ) S_ICUT ON I.OWKEY = S_ICUT.OWKEY AND I.ICKEY = S_ICUT.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_REQORDER RO ON IC.OWKEY = RO.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RO.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RO.ICKEY INNER JOIN TORDER_MST_AC AC ON I.OWKEY = AC.OWKEY AND I.ACKEY = AC.ACKEY AND AC.DELYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_OBSTAT_AVG AV ON IC.OWKEY = AV.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = AV.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = AV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN ( SELECT OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY , TRUNC(SUM(QTY) / 30) AS QTY FROM TORDER_INFO_ORDER_STAT WHERE CRITDAY BETWEEN TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30 days', 'yyyyMMdd') AND TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') GROUP BY OWKEY, CTKEY, ICKEY ) ST ON IC.OWKEY = ST.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = ST.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ST.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDERIV RIV ON IC.OWKEY = RIV.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RIV.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RIV.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_REQORDER RE ON IC.OWKEY = RE.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = RE.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = RE.ICKEY AND RE.REQORDERDAY = TO_CHAR(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 'yyyyMMdd') AND RE.URGENCYREQORDERYN = 'N' LEFT JOIN TORDER_INFO_SO_HD SO ON RE.OWKEY = SO.OWKEY AND RE.REQORDERNO = SO.RFRNCKEY AND RE.IBEXPCTDAY = SO.DLVYEXPCTDAY AND SO.WKSTATUS != #{soCancelStatus} LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_LC LC ON IC.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IC.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_OBAVGQTY OBAVG ON IC.OWKEY = OBAVG.OWKEY AND IC.CTKEY = OBAVG.CTKEY AND IC.ICKEY = OBAVG.ICKEY WHERE I.POABLEYN = 'Y' AND RO.REQORDERTYPE = '04' -- REQORDERTYPE : 04(부자재)
AND I.OWKEY = #{OWKEY}
AND IC.CTKEY = #{CTKEY}
AND IC.ICKEY IN
#{item}
AND RE.REQORDERSTATUS = #{REQORDERSTATUS}
AND RE.REQORDEREXCEPTYN = #{REQORDEREXCEPTYN}
) F
1 = 1
AND F.PONEEDDAYS <= 0
AND F.PONEEDDAYS > 0
ORDER BY #{colName} DESC
ORDER BY #{colName} ASC
ORDER BY F.UPDATEDATE DESC NULLS LAST, F.ICKEY ASC
) T #{GRIDPAGING_ROWNUMTYPE_BOTTOM}
